name: radio-group
description: APG Radio Group -- mutually-exclusive option group (default pill, button-bar, native fieldset variants). Custom variants driven by radio-group.enhancer.ts (roving-tabindex + aria-checked); native variant is platform-supplied. Options arrive via @param, never hardcoded. Composes with the field partial via aria-labelledby / aria-describedby.
docs: Copies the radio-group partial + its enhancer to your project. The partial renders role=radiogroup + role=radio divs (custom) or a fieldset+legend+inputs (native). Install the enhancer in your main.ts: import { installRadioGroup } from './lievit/radio-group.enhancer'; installRadioGroup(runtime). The native variant (nativeInputs=true) needs no enhancer. Options come from a typed List<RadioOption> passed by the controller -- RadioOption must satisfy id(), label(), description(), disabled().
